Official 2018-07-23 Chemkin release; clean conversion. Screening excluded it from the primary ensemble: LBV converged for 22/80 points, exact-criterion IDT mean absolute log10 error was 0.842, and He-containing JSR conditions were unsupported. Retained as an auditable compact baseline.

Official dataset DOI 10.17632/25zw5d5ttw.3; 124 species and 1081 reactions; complete multicomponent transport. Conversion required one documented Ar-to-AR case normalization and permissive handling of duplicate CN/HNOH transport entries. HOCHO retains a thermo discontinuity warning. IDT completed 46/46 and JSR 48/48; LBV feasibility completed only 3/21 cases within a 300 s per-case limit, so the model is excluded from LBV stacking.
